title: Kimi K2.6 and Agent Swarm explained..
summary: Kimi K2.6 was released by MoonShot AI as an improved coding model designed for long-running tasks and agent swarm applications. The model represents advances from Chinese AI labs in building more stable and comprehensive LLMs.
